```{python}
import pandas as pd
import geopandas as gpd
from pathlib import Path
from os.path import join
import altair as alt
import numpy as np
import time
import statsmodels.api as sm
import streamlit as st
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import warnings
warnings.filterwarnings("ignore")
alt.renderers.enable("png")
alt.data_transformers.disable_max_rows()

data_path = "data/external"
```

# Improve Graph Resolution
```{python}
import tempfile 
from IPython.display import SVG, display, Image
import vl_convert as vlc

def display_altair_png(chart, scale=2):
    """
    Render an Altair chart to a PNG and display it inline.

    Parameters
    ----------
    chart : altair.Chart
        Altair chart object to render.
    scale : int, optional
        Resolution scaling factor for the PNG (default = 2). Use scale=2 for standard slides. Use scale = 3–4 for dense figures or PDF exports.
    """
    png_bytes = vlc.vegalite_to_png(chart.to_dict(), scale=scale)

    # Write to a temporary PNG file and display
    with tempfile.NamedTemporaryFile(suffix=".png") as tmp:
        tmp.write(png_bytes)
        tmp.flush()
        display(Image(filename=tmp.name))
```

# Import Cleaned Dataset
```{python}
# Path to cleaned dataset
data_path = Path("data/cleaned_data.csv")

# If cleaned file does not exist, run preprocessing
if not data_path.exists():
    from preprocessing import build_data
    build_data()

# Load cleaned dataset
health_county = pd.read_csv(
    data_path,
    dtype={"CountyFIPS": str}
)

# Preview
health_county.head()
len(health_county)
```


# Descriptive Statistics
```{python}
prevalence_df = health_county.melt(
    id_vars=["CountyName"],
    value_vars=[
        "DIABETES_CrudePrev",
        "DEPRESSION_CrudePrev",
        "CHD_CrudePrev"
    ],
    var_name="Disease",
    value_name="Prevalence"
)

prevalence = alt.Chart(prevalence_df).mark_boxplot().encode(
    x=alt.X(
        "Disease:N",
        title="Disease"
    ),
    y=alt.Y(
        "Prevalence:Q",
        title="Prevalence (%)"
    ),
    color="Disease:N"
).properties(

    width=400,
    height=400,
    title="Disease Prevalence Descriptive Statistics"
)

prevalence
```

```{python}
physicians_coverage = alt.Chart(health_county).mark_bar().encode(
    x=alt.X(
        "physicians_cap40:Q",
        bin=alt.Bin(step=2, extent=[0,40]),
        axis=alt.Axis(labelExpr="datum.value == 40 ? '>=40' : datum.value"),
        title="Physicians per 10k Adults"
    ),
    y=alt.Y(
        "count()",
        title="Number of Counties"
    )
)

physicians_coverage


beds_coverage = alt.Chart(health_county).mark_bar().encode(
    x=alt.X(
        "beds_cap40:Q",
        bin=alt.Bin(step=2, extent=[0,40]),
        axis=alt.Axis(labelExpr="datum.value == 40 ? '>=40' : datum.value"),
        title="Beds per 10k Adults"
    ),
    y=alt.Y(
        "count()",
        title="Number of Counties"
    )
)

beds_coverage
```

```{python}
diabetes = alt.Chart(health_county).mark_bar().encode(
    x = alt.X("DIABETES_CrudePrev:Q", 
    bin=alt.Bin(step=2), 
    title="Diabetes (%)",
    scale=alt.Scale(domain=[0, 36]),
    axis=alt.Axis(values=list(range(0,36,2)))),
    y = alt.Y("count()", title="Number of Counties", scale=alt.Scale(domain=[0, 1200]))
).properties(width=250, height=200)

chd = alt.Chart(health_county).mark_bar().encode(
    x = alt.X("CHD_CrudePrev:Q", 
    bin=alt.Bin(step=2), 
    title="CHD (%)", 
    scale=alt.Scale(domain=[0, 36]),
    axis=alt.Axis(values=list(range(0,36,2)))),
    y = alt.Y("count()", title="Number of Counties", scale=alt.Scale(domain=[0, 1200]))
).properties(width=250, height=200)

depression = alt.Chart(health_county).mark_bar().encode(
    x = alt.X("DEPRESSION_CrudePrev:Q", 
    bin=alt.Bin(step=2), 
    title="Depression (%)", 
    scale=alt.Scale(domain=[0, 36]),
    axis=alt.Axis(values=list(range(0,36,2)))),
    y = alt.Y("count()", title="Number of Counties", scale=alt.Scale(domain=[0, 1200]))
).properties(width=250, height=200)

diabetes & chd & depression
```

# Correlation Analysis
```{python}
model_map = {
    "CHD_CrudePrev": [
        "physicians_per10k",
        "cardiologists_per10k",
        "beds_per10k",
        "beds_acute_per10k",
        "beds_icu_per10k"
    ],
    "DIABETES_CrudePrev": [
        "physicians_per10k",
        "general_internal_med_per10k",
        "beds_per10k",
        "beds_acute_per10k",
        "beds_icu_per10k"
    ],
    "DEPRESSION_CrudePrev": [
        "physicians_per10k",
        "psych_per10k",
        "beds_per10k",
        "beds_acute_per10k",
        "beds_icu_per10k"
    ]
}
results = []

for disease, supplies in model_map.items():
    for supply in supplies:
        df = health_county[[disease, supply]].dropna()
        X = sm.add_constant(df[supply])
        y = df[disease]
        model = sm.OLS(y, X).fit()
        coef = model.params[supply]
        results.append({
            "Disease": disease,
            "Supply": supply,
            "Coefficient": coef
        })

coef_df = pd.DataFrame(results)

rename_supply = {
    "physicians_per10k":"Physicians Count",
    "cardiologists_per10k":"Cardiologists Count",
    "general_internal_med_per10k":"Internal Medicine Physicians Count",
    "psych_per10k":"Psychiatrists Count",
    "beds_per10k":"Total Beds Count",
    "beds_acute_per10k":"Acute Beds Count",
    "beds_icu_per10k":"ICU Beds Count"
}

rename_disease = {
    "CHD_CrudePrev":"CHD",
    "DIABETES_CrudePrev":"Diabetes",
    "DEPRESSION_CrudePrev":"Depression"
}

coef_df["Supply"] = coef_df["Supply"].replace(rename_supply)

coef_df["Disease"] = coef_df["Disease"].replace(rename_disease)

max_coef = abs(coef_df["Coefficient"]).max()

heatmap = alt.Chart(coef_df).mark_rect().encode(
    x=alt.X("Supply:N", title="Healthcare Supply per 10k Adults",
    sort=[
        "Physicians Count",
        "Total Beds Count",
        "Acute Beds Count",
        "ICU Beds Count",
        "Cardiologists Count",
        "Internal Medicine Physicians Count",
        "Psychiatrists Count",
    ]),
    y=alt.Y("Disease:N", title="Disease Prevalence",
            sort=["CHD", "Diabetes", "Depression"]),
    color=alt.Color(
        "Coefficient:Q",
        scale=alt.Scale(
            scheme="redblue",
            domain=[-max_coef, max_coef]
        ),
        title="Regression Coefficient"
    )
).properties(
    width=550,
    height=200,
    title="Single-Variable Regressions: Disease Prevalence vs Supply per 10k Adults"
)

heatmap
```


# Diabetes
```{python}
diabetes_df = health_county.dropna(
    subset=["diabetes_supply_group","DIABETES_CrudePrev"]
).copy()

order = [
    "No Providers",
    "Very Low",
    "Low",
    "Medium",
    "High",
    "Very High"
]

color_scale = alt.Scale(
    domain=order,
    range=["#464243ff","#b2182b","#ef8a62","#fddbc7","#67a9cf","#2166ac"]
)

ci = alt.Chart(diabetes_df).mark_errorbar(
    extent="ci",
    size=3,
    ticks=True,
    color="#4A4A4A"
).encode(
    x=alt.X(
        "diabetes_supply_group:N",
        sort=order,
        title="Internal Medicine Physician Supply"
    ),
    y="DIABETES_CrudePrev:Q"
)

points = alt.Chart(diabetes_df).mark_point(
    filled=True,
    size=220,
    stroke="white",
    strokeWidth=1.5
).encode(
    x=alt.X(
        "diabetes_supply_group:N",
        sort=order
    ),
    y=alt.Y(
        "mean(DIABETES_CrudePrev):Q",
        title="Mean Diabetes Prevalence (%)",
        scale=alt.Scale(zero=False)
    ),
    color=alt.Color(
        "diabetes_supply_group:N",
        scale=color_scale,
        legend=None
    )
)

diabetes_plot = (ci + points).properties(
    width=700,
    height=420,
    title="Diabetes Prevalence by Internal Medicine Physician Supply"
).configure_axis(
    labelFontSize=12,
    titleFontSize=14
).configure_title(
    fontSize=16,
    anchor="middle"
).configure_view(
    stroke=None
)

diabetes_plot
```

# CHD
```{python}
chd_df = health_county.dropna(
    subset=["chd_supply_group","CHD_CrudePrev"]
).copy()

order = [
    "No Providers",
    "Very Low",
    "Low",
    "Medium",
    "High",
    "Very High"
]

color_scale = alt.Scale(
    domain=order,
    range=["#464243ff","#b2182b","#ef8a62","#fddbc7","#67a9cf","#2166ac"]
)

ci = alt.Chart(chd_df).mark_errorbar(
    extent="ci",
    size=3,
    ticks=True,
    color="#4A4A4A"
).encode(
    x=alt.X(
        "chd_supply_group:N",
        sort=order,
        title="Cardiologist Supply"
    ),
    y="CHD_CrudePrev:Q"
)

points = alt.Chart(chd_df).mark_point(
    filled=True,
    size=220,
    stroke="white",
    strokeWidth=1.5
).encode(
    x=alt.X(
        "chd_supply_group:N",
        sort=order
    ),
    y=alt.Y(
        "mean(CHD_CrudePrev):Q",
        title="Mean CHD Prevalence (%)",
        scale=alt.Scale(zero=False)
    ),
    color=alt.Color(
        "chd_supply_group:N",
        scale=color_scale,
        legend=None
    )
)

chd_plot = (ci + points).properties(
    width=700,
    height=420,
    title="CHD Prevalence by Cardiologist Supply"
).configure_axis(
    labelFontSize=12,
    titleFontSize=14
).configure_title(
    fontSize=16,
    anchor="middle"
).configure_view(
    stroke=None
)

chd_plot
```

# Depression
```{python}
depression_df = health_county.dropna(
    subset=["depression_supply_group","DEPRESSION_CrudePrev"]
).copy()

order = [
    "No Providers",
    "Very Low",
    "Low",
    "Medium",
    "High",
    "Very High"
]

color_scale = alt.Scale(
    domain=order,
    range=["#464243ff","#b2182b","#ef8a62","#fddbc7","#67a9cf","#2166ac"]
)

ci = alt.Chart(depression_df).mark_errorbar(
    extent="ci",
    size=3,
    ticks=True,
    color="#4A4A4A"
).encode(
    x=alt.X(
        "depression_supply_group:N",
        sort=order,
        title="Psychiatrist Supply"
    ),
    y="DEPRESSION_CrudePrev:Q"
)

points = alt.Chart(depression_df).mark_point(
    filled=True,
    size=220,
    stroke="white",
    strokeWidth=1.5
).encode(
    x=alt.X(
        "depression_supply_group:N",
        sort=order
    ),
    y=alt.Y(
        "mean(DEPRESSION_CrudePrev):Q",
        title="Mean Depression Prevalence (%)",
        scale=alt.Scale(zero=False)
    ),
    color=alt.Color(
        "depression_supply_group:N",
        scale=color_scale,
        legend=None
    )
)

depression_plot = (ci + points).properties(
    width=700,
    height=420,
    title="Depression Prevalence by Psychiatrist Supply"
).configure_axis(
    labelFontSize=12,
    titleFontSize=14
).configure_title(
    fontSize=16,
    anchor="middle"
).configure_view(
    stroke=None
)

depression_plot
```


# Geo Plots
```{python}
%matplotlib inline

health_gis = gpd.read_parquet("data/cleaned_data_gis.parquet")
health_gis_proj = health_gis.to_crs(epsg=5070)

health_gis_proj = health_gis_proj[
    ~health_gis_proj["STATEFP"].isin(["02","15","72"])
]

# Diabetes
fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(12,8))

health_gis_proj.plot(
    column="DIABETES_CrudePrev",
    cmap="Reds",
    linewidth=0.1,
    edgecolor="white",
    legend=True,
    ax=ax,
    legend_kwds={"label":"Diabetes Prevalence (%)"}
)

ax.set_title("County-Level Diabetes Prevalence", fontsize=16)
ax.axis("off")

plt.show()


# CHD
fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(12,8))

health_gis_proj.plot(
    column="CHD_CrudePrev",
    cmap="Oranges",
    linewidth=0.1,
    edgecolor="white",
    legend=True,
    ax=ax,
    legend_kwds={"label":"CHD Prevalence (%)"}
)

ax.set_title("County-Level CHD Prevalence", fontsize=16)
ax.axis("off")

plt.show()


# Depression
fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(12,8))

health_gis_proj.plot(
    column="DEPRESSION_CrudePrev",
    cmap="Purples",
    linewidth=0.1,
    edgecolor="white",
    legend=True,
    ax=ax,
    legend_kwds={"label":"Depression Prevalence (%)"}
)

ax.set_title("County-Level Depression Prevalence", fontsize=16)
ax.axis("off")

plt.show()


# Physicians Supplies
bins = [0,5,10,20,30,40,np.inf]
labels = ["0–5","5–10","10–20","20–30","30–40","≥ 40"]

health_gis_proj["physician_cat"] = pd.cut(
    health_gis_proj["physicians_per10k"],
    bins=bins,
    labels=labels,
    include_lowest=True
)

fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(12,8))

health_gis_proj.plot(
    column="physician_cat",
    cmap="Blues",
    linewidth=0.1,
    edgecolor="black",
    legend=True,
    ax=ax,
    legend_kwds={
        "title":"Physicians per 10k Adults",
        "loc":"lower right",
        "frameon":True
    }
)

ax.set_title("County-Level Physician Supply (per 10k Adults)", fontsize=16)
ax.axis("off")
plt.tight_layout()
plt.show()


# Beds Supplies
bins = [0,5,10,20,30,40,np.inf]
labels = ["0–5","5–10","10–20","20–30","30–40","≥ 40"]

health_gis_proj["bed_cat"] = pd.cut(
    health_gis_proj["beds_per10k"],
    bins=bins,
    labels=labels,
    include_lowest=True
)

fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(12,8))

health_gis_proj.plot(
    column="bed_cat",
    cmap="Greens",
    linewidth=0.1,
    edgecolor="white",
    legend=True,
    ax=ax,
    legend_kwds={
        "title":"Beds per 10k Adults",
        "loc":"lower right",
        "frameon":True
    }
)

ax.set_title("County-Level Bed Supply (per 10k Adults)", fontsize=16)
ax.axis("off")
plt.tight_layout()
plt.show()
```
